creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 243062
x11/{nvidia-driver, linux-nvidia-libs} 535.54.03

(In reply to Kevin Bowling from comment #7)
>  .if ${OSVERSION} >= 1400070
> +.  if ${NVVERSION} < 530.03002
Convention (through the Makefile) is to use && rather than two .if's, otherwise the patchset looks fine.
